subcodes.first_line: O thou trusted one of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! A letter hath been received from Kiumars Pourkhosrow, the Persian, addressed to thee. Therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امین عبدالبهاء از جناب کیومرث پورخسرو پارسی نامه ای بنام شما وارد شد در آن
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @Hands of the Cause, @business; financial; property matters, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
